meta.title: Generation and Characterization of a Non-defective Interfering Particle of Vesicular Stomatitis Virus: Homotypic and Heterotypic Interference

abstractHtml: Serial undiluted passages of vesicular stomatitis virus in African green monkey kidney (CV-1) cells resulted in the generation of a small-plaque-forming mutant. This mutant has been characterized as a non-defective particle with homotypic and heterotypic interference properties.
